root_text.an2.77:1.1: “Sanimittā, bhikkhave, uppajjanti pāpakā akusalā dhammā, no animittā.
root_text.an2.77:1.2: Tasseva nimittassa pahānā evaṁ te pāpakā akusalā dhammā na hontī”ti.
root_text.an2.78:1.1: “Sanidānā, bhikkhave, uppajjanti pāpakā akusalā dhammā, no anidānā.
root_text.an2.78:1.2: Tasseva nidānassa pahānā evaṁ te pāpakā akusalā dhammā na hontī”ti.
root_text.an2.79:1.1: “Sahetukā, bhikkhave, uppajjanti pāpakā akusalā dhammā, no ahetukā.
root_text.an2.79:1.2: Tasseva hetussa pahānā evaṁ te pāpakā akusalā dhammā na hontī”ti.
root_text.an2.80:1.1: “Sasaṅkhārā, bhikkhave, uppajjanti pāpakā akusalā dhammā, no asaṅkhārā.
root_text.an2.80:1.2: Tesaṁyeva saṅkhārānaṁ pahānā evaṁ te pāpakā akusalā dhammā na hontī”ti.
root_text.an2.81:1.1: “Sappaccayā, bhikkhave, uppajjanti pāpakā akusalā dhammā, no appaccayā.
root_text.an2.81:1.2: Tasseva paccayassa pahānā evaṁ te pāpakā akusalā dhammā na hontī”ti.
root_text.an2.82:1.1: “Sarūpā, bhikkhave, uppajjanti pāpakā akusalā dhammā, no arūpā.
root_text.an2.82:1.2: Tasseva rūpassa pahānā evaṁ te pāpakā akusalā dhammā na hontī”ti.
root_text.an2.83:1.1: “Savedanā, bhikkhave, uppajjanti pāpakā akusalā dhammā, no avedanā.
root_text.an2.83:1.2: Tassāyeva vedanāya pahānā evaṁ te pāpakā akusalā dhammā na hontī”ti.
root_text.an2.84:1.1: “Sasaññā, bhikkhave, uppajjanti pāpakā akusalā dhammā, no asaññā.
root_text.an2.84:1.2: Tassāyeva saññāya pahānā evaṁ te pāpakā akusalā dhammā na hontī”ti.
root_text.an2.85:1.1: “Saviññāṇā, bhikkhave, uppajjanti pāpakā akusalā dhammā, no aviññāṇā.
root_text.an2.85:1.2: Tasseva viññāṇassa pahānā evaṁ te pāpakā akusalā dhammā na hontī”ti.
root_text.an2.86:1.1: “Saṅkhatārammaṇā, bhikkhave, uppajjanti pāpakā akusalā dhammā, no asaṅkhatārammaṇā.
root_text.an2.86:1.2: Tasseva saṅkhatassa pahānā evaṁ te pāpakā akusalā dhammā na hontī”ti.

translation_text.an2.77:1.1: “Bad, unskillful qualities, mendicants, arise with a basis, not without a basis.
translation_text.an2.77:1.2: By giving up that basis, those bad, unskillful qualities do not occur.”
translation_text.an2.78:1.1: “Bad, unskillful qualities, mendicants, arise with a source, not without a source.
translation_text.an2.78:1.2: By giving up that source, those bad, unskillful qualities do not occur.”
translation_text.an2.79:1.1: “Bad, unskillful qualities, mendicants, arise with a cause, not without a cause.
translation_text.an2.79:1.2: By giving up that cause, those bad, unskillful qualities do not occur.”
translation_text.an2.80:1.1: “Bad, unskillful qualities, mendicants, arise with conditions, not without conditions.
translation_text.an2.80:1.2: By giving up those conditions, those bad, unskillful qualities do not occur.”
translation_text.an2.81:1.1: “Bad, unskillful qualities, mendicants, arise with a reason, not without a reason.
translation_text.an2.81:1.2: By giving up that reason, those bad, unskillful qualities do not occur.”
translation_text.an2.82:1.1: “Bad, unskillful qualities, mendicants, arise with form, not without form.
translation_text.an2.82:1.2: By giving up that form, those bad, unskillful qualities do not occur.”
translation_text.an2.83:1.1: “Bad, unskillful qualities, mendicants, arise with feeling, not without feeling.
translation_text.an2.83:1.2: By giving up that feeling, those bad, unskillful qualities do not occur.”
translation_text.an2.84:1.1: “Bad, unskillful qualities, mendicants, arise with perception, not without perception.
translation_text.an2.84:1.2: By giving up that perception, those bad, unskillful qualities do not occur.”
translation_text.an2.85:1.1: “Bad, unskillful qualities, mendicants, arise with consciousness, not without consciousness.
translation_text.an2.85:1.2: By giving up that consciousness, those bad, unskillful qualities do not occur.”
translation_text.an2.86:1.1: “Bad, unskillful qualities, mendicants, arise with a conditioned basis, not without a conditioned basis.
translation_text.an2.86:1.2: By giving up that conditioned basis, those bad, unskillful qualities do not occur.”
